name: Creamy Apple Broccoslaw
recipeIngredient: 2 cups apples, dipped in lemon juice, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the vinegar, lemon juice, sugar, mustard, and salt.
Stir until the ingredients are well mixed.
2. Add the sour cream to the mixture and stir again.
3. Cover the bowl and chill in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld together.
4. Just before serving, add the dressing to the Broccoslaw mix and toss gently until all the components are evenly coated.
